episodes.title: Gov. JB Pritzker denies having any ties to Jeffrey Epstein following Bill Clinton's deposition
episodes.description: Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker is flatly denying the suggestion that he flew on convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein's plane on a trip with former president Bill Clinton. WGN's Tahman Bradley has the full story.

episodes.title: Clintons tangle with Epstein investigators in deposition videos
episodes.description: The House Oversight and Government Reform Committee on Monday released video footage of its depositions of Bill and Hillary Clinton, showing the former president and former secretary of State’s responses as they were grilled about their connections to the convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

episodes.title: 'Cults Like Us: Why Doomsday Thinking Drives America'
episodes.description:
New book about the history of cult ideologies in America, and how the country remains a breeding ground for cult-like thinking. Culture journalist Jane Borden uncovers the American history you didn’t learn in school, including how we are still being brainwashed, making us a nation of easy marks for con artists and strong men. 

janeborden.com
Instagram & X: @janeborden
